_about: Curated registry of high-signal YouTube teachers, the primary source for ai-firehose.com. Eric edits this file. Each channel is polled via its free RSS feed: https://www.youtube.com/feeds/videos.xml?channel_id=<channel_id> (no API key).
_instructions: Find a channel_id from the channel page HTML (search the page source for "channelId") or with yt-dlp (yt-dlp --print channel_id <channel_url>). authority_weight in [0,1] scales how strongly the channel moves the rotation: favorite, highest-signal teachers near 1.0. kind_bias is only a hint; the classifier decides each video's kind. Set active true to include a channel.
